steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The sentence structure “to ______ this problem by transmitting molecules through carbon nanotubes” indicates the blank must be a verb accomplished by this method. Only a word meaning “solve” or “handle” fits this pattern.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Overcome” fits directly — to overcome a problem is to successfully solve or handle it. The other three choices describe unrelated actions: conceptualize (form an idea), illustrate (explain), and neglect (ignore). That matches choice D — D is correct.
